context: Rural government school in Andhra Pradesh. Students have had previous Agastya sessions. The regular science teacher is watching from the back of the room.
openingScene: You walk into the classroom with a plastic ruler, a table, and a balloon. The students are seated on benches. Priya is in the front row, already looking at the ruler curiously. Ravi is in the second row with arms crossed, wondering what you could possibly do with a ruler. Lakshmi is in the back corner. Arjun is in the last row near the window, blowing air from his mouth. Meena is in the middle, notebook already open.
